name: Portal Sheath
description: A sheath that opens onto elsewhere.
effect: The wielder can make a Melee attack with this weapon against a target within Sensors, but that attack cannot benefit from any Talents.

name: Corona Coil
description: This system allows a melee weapon to be fed power directly from a frame's reactor.
effect: Activated as a Quick Tech: while active, this weapon is wreathed in energy, changing its damage type to Energy and giving it the Overkill quality.

actions.name: Activate Corona Coil
actions.detail: While active, this weapon is wreathed in energy, changing its damage type to Energy and giving it the Overkill quality.

name: Chain Capacitor
description: A capacitor bank that arcs stored charge between adjacent targets.
effect: When activated, your frame takes 1 Heat. When you deal damage to an enemy with this weapon, the damage can be split among the target and adjacent units, as evenly as possible.

name: Drone Target Assist
effect: This weapon gains +1 Accuracy when attacking targets adjacent to one of your deployables.
